name: Hi-Jack
author: Barrie Evans (1998); Abstract Games issue 14, Summer 2003
description: Barrie Evans' territorial stacking game: place pieces (they never move) whose stacks project 'territorial strength' over the board. Out-strength a square to place there; out-strength an opponent stack (by its height) to hi-jack it. Score unoccupied territory plus hi-jacked stacks.
